description: Classic Centipede shooter — segmented centipede descends through a mushroom field, player shoots from the bottom row, segments break into independent pieces. Canvas-rendered, RAF loop, IBM Plex Mono retro typography, localStorage high score.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated from mchatai.com/hub/centipede/play (publisher GI1GHQ7w). Working segmented-enemy logic + mushroom field collision. Mono-font reference look. Preserve the segment-array data structure and per-segment update step when modifying.
